title: Jiu Jitsu Fundamentals - BJJ Lab Zürich
text: HOW TO START? Home > Programs > Jiu Jitsu Fundamentals JIU JITSU FUNDAMENTALS In our fundamentals classes you learn everything that you need to know to get from white belt to blue belt. OUR ONE WEEK FREE TRIAL To help you determine if BJJ Lab Zürich is the right fit for you, we offer a free one-week trial. During this period, you can fully immerse yourself in our classes. If you have prior BJJ training experience, please send us a message detailing your background. This will allow us to recommend the most suitable classes for you. If necessary, we provide free loaner uniforms for both gi and nogi trainings, ensuring you have everything you need to get started. SCHEDULE YOUR FIRST CLASS OUR METHOD At BJJ Lab Zürich, we focus on teaching modern, high-percentage techniques and systems. Our goal is to help you improve as quickly and effectively as possible. 12 fundamentals classes per week 22 trainings per week Gym access during classes Access to our video library Structured 16-week curriculum One topic per week Modern techniques Qualified coaches VIEW SCHEDULE READY TO TRY JIU JITSU? Send us a message on Whatsapp or through our contact form to schedule your first class. We are happy to answer any questions and look forward to meeting you!
